editor_brief_summary: Keep hq.html as a cornerstone progression guide, but tighten the first-screen answer so it explicitly cross-checks HQ requirements and dependency planning without changing page role or cluster fit.
first_screen_plan: Preserve the answer-first structure. Keep the opening focused on the best HQ path for most players, but make the first visible answer clearly state the requirement cross-check angle: early rush, required-buildings-only upgrades, HQ30 target, then a separate HQ31-35 steel phase. Avoid adding a new intent or expanding into a different guide type. Keep the short supporting line immediately after the answer so users can confirm this is a planning guide, not a full route map.

exact_replacements.exact_old: Best Last Z HQ upgrade path for most players: rush early levels, upgrade only required buildings, push efficiently to HQ30 first, and treat HQ31-35 as a separate steel-based progression phase with much heavier timers.
exact_replacements.exact_new: Best Last Z HQ upgrade path for most players: rush early levels, upgrade only the buildings required for the next HQ checkpoint, push efficiently to HQ30 first, and treat HQ31-35 as a separate steel-based progression phase with much heavier timers.
